zh.lifeSummary: 當Judith d'Avranches於1050年8月19日出生在法國諾門迪曼其阿福朗徹斯時，她的父親Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches24歲，母親Emma de Conteville15歲。她和Sir Richer de L'Aigle至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。她去世於1109年5月21日在法國巴-諾門迪卡爾瓦多斯貝也享年58歲。

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Judith d'Avranches was born on 19 August 1050, in Avranches, Manche, Normandy, France, her father, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, was 24 and her mother, Emma de Conteville, was 15. She had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Sir Richer de L'Aigle. She died on 21 May 1109, in Bayeux, Calvados, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Judith d'Avranches est née le 19 août 1050, à Avranches, Manche, Normandie, France, son père, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Emma de Conteville, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Sir Richer de L'Aigle. Elle est décédée le 21 mai 1109, à Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.Mayenne-Est, Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de l: Mayenne-Est, Mayenne, Mayenne, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich
de.lifeSummary: Als Judith d'Avranches am 19. August 1050 in Avranches, Manche, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches 24 und ihre Mutter Emma de Conteville 15. Sie hatte mit Sir Richer de L'Aigle mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. Mai 1109 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Sir Richer de L'Aigle. Morì il 21 maggio 1109, nel Bayeux, Calvados, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Judith d'Avranchesが1050年8月19日にフランスノーマンディマンチェアvランチェスで生まれた時，父Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranchesは24歳，母Emma de Contevilleは15歳であった。彼女はSir Richer de L'Aigleとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1109年5月21日にフランスバセ-ノーマンディカルヴァドスバイエウックスで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Judith d'Avranches(이)가 1050년 8월 19일 프랑스 노먼디 먼체 아브랭체스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Emma de Conteville(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 Sir Richer de L'Aigle(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1109년 5월 21일 프랑스 배세-노먼디 캘바도스 베이우스에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Judith d'Avranches nasceu em 19 de agosto de 1050, em Avranches, Manche, Normandie, França, seu pai, Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Conteville, tinha 15 anos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Judith d'Avranches родилась 19 августа 1050 г. в местности авранчесь, манч, норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Richard le Goz Viscount of Avranches было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Emma de Conteville, 15. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Sir Richer de L'Aigle. Она умерла 21 мая 1109 г. в местности беиеукс, калвадос, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.
